name: Boomerang
description: Boomerang is a self-hosted backup tool for websites (SFTP, rsync, FTP) and MySQL databases. It ships as a single Go binary with a web UI, local schedules, and optional Cloudflare R2 off-site copies.

notes.text: Set your admin password on first visit. Keep port 8080 on your LAN only.
Installs the latest release binary from GitHub (supermaribo/boomerang).
